case_title: NICK G. TARLSON VS. MATT GILLETT et al.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD. COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILLETT, JENNIFER

THE FOLLOWING ENTRY MADE AS PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT:
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARLSON, NICK G. AS TO DEFENDANT GILLETT, JENNIFER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF NICK G. TARLSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATT GILLETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JENNIFER GILLETT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARLSON, NICK G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILLETT, MATT GILLETT, JENNIFER $2,916.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,081.00, DEFENDANT'S MATT AND JENNIFER GILLETT ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARLSON, NICK G. AS TO DEFENDANT GILLETT, MATT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILLETT, JENNIFER
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY TARLSON, NICK G. GILLETT, MATT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.
